summary: Iteration 45: MEGA FINALIZATION - All 4 phases validated. Menu corrections verified (Super Admin: NO Limites/Gestion Financière/LOTO PAM; Vendeur: NO Fiches Payées; Company Admin: HAS Gestion Financière). Dashboard stats are real data. Commission defaults to 0 when not configured. Winning calculation 60/20/10 correct (ticket 558296411985929: 88→1500, 50→500, 05→250 = 2250 HTG). 14/14 backend tests passed.
